message:
style: minor code quality improvements in tools and config modules

**tools.rs**:
- Restore .content.clone() in ReadTool output path where the value is
  used later in truncation reporting (the previous .content move caused
  a use-after-move when truncation details reference the original)
- Add descriptive assertion message to normalize_for_match proptest
  ("normalize_for_match should remove target punctuation/space variants")
- Reformat safe_relative_path() proptest strategy as single-line chain

**config.rs**:
- Promote sanitize_alpha() from fn to const fn since it only uses
  is_finite() and clamp() which are both const-evaluable
- Reorder test module imports to alphabetical (rustfmt canonical order)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
